title: CNBC UK Exchange newsletter: A UK 'wealth tax' is fraught with complications
summary_full: Labour's Wes Streeting wants to raise the rate at which capital gains are taxed into line with the higher and top rates of income tax.
summary_public: Labour's Wes Streeting wants to raise the rate at which capital gains are taxed into line with the higher and top rates of income tax.
